flags.explanation: MSRP $91.00/g vs cohort median $50.50/g for live resin cart. Premium of 80%.
Distillate format showing multiple minor cannabinoids may indicate distillate plus broad-spectrum blending. Not a labeling violation, but worth verification on the COA.
MSRP $60.50/g vs cohort median $35.50/g for distillate cart. Premium of 70%.

Marketing claims live resin or live rosin extraction, but the cannabinoid profile shows measurable CBD. Real live-extraction products from typical high-THC cultivars rarely show CBD on the label unless the source strain has CBD genetics. Verify the source cultivar matches the cannabinoid mix.
